title: Weave build executor
description: Run `weave build` for a Weave project.

config.description: Path to the weave.config file (relative to the project root).

outputPath.description: Output directory (Nx convention: dist/<projectRoot> under the workspace root). Defaults to <workspaceRoot>/dist/<projectRoot> when unset.

outDir.description: Override the output directory (alias of outputPath; outputPath wins if both are set).
